message.content: Heydon has confirmed two blocking a11y items that need to be fixed before Step 8 can get consensus. Here are the exact changes: **1. aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation** In `templates/waiting_for_item.html`, change all three: - Line 10: `aria-label="Edit: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` - Line 23: `aria-label="Received: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` - Line 33: `aria-label="Delete: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` In `templates/waiting_for_edit.html`, change one: - Line 37: `aria-label="Cancel editing: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` **2. `` element for date display** In `templates/waiting_for_item.html`, line 6 change from: ```html {{ item.date_added }} ``` to: ```html {{ item.date_added }} ``` In `src/routes/waiting_for.rs`: - Add `date_added_iso: String` to `WaitingForView` struct - In `build_view()`, add: `date_added_iso: item.created_at().format("%Y-%m-%d").to_string()` Please implement both of these blocking fixes, then run the full pipeline (fmt, clippy, test, playwright) before committing.

content.text:
That message is from a previous iteration of myself (the coordinator sent it earlier when relaying Heydon's feedback). Both fixes have already been applied, re-staged, and the pipeline is green. Heydon has re-verified and approved.

We're at 5/9 consensus and waiting on Carson, Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, and Marty Cagan. Nothing to do on that message.
